hooks.command: jq -r 'if .tool_response.filePath then .tool_response.filePath elif .tool_input.file_path then .tool_input.file_path else empty end' 2>/dev/null | { read -r f; case "$f" in /home/loasic/EDA/autortl/autortl/src/verilog/*.v) echo "[PostToolUse Lint] $f"; verilator --lint-only --Wall --Wno-fatal "$f" 2>&1 | tee -a /home/loasic/EDA/autortl/autortl/sim/logs/lint.log || true;; esac; }

PROJECT_ID=$(ls -t ~/.claude/projects/-home-loasic-EDA-autortl-autortl/*.jsonl 2>/dev/null | head -1 | xargs basename 2>/dev/null); TIMESTAMP=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d_%H-%M-%S'); SESSION_FILE=$(ls -t ~/.claude/projects/-home-loasic-EDA-autortl-autortl/*.jsonl 2>/dev/null | head -1); if [ -n "$SESSION_FILE" ]; then cp "$SESSION_FILE" "/home/loasic/EDA/autortl/autortl/agent/logs/session_${TIMESTAMP}.jsonl" && echo "[$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %%H:%M:%S')] Session saved: session_${TIMESTAMP}.jsonl (${PROJECT_ID})" >> /home/loasic/EDA/autortl/autortl/sim/logs/notification.log; fi
bash -c 'echo "[ 自动附加上下文 ] 当前分支: $(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo unknown); 最近提交: $(git log --oneline -1 2>/dev/null || echo none)"'
